title: Microtrichomanes nitidulum
taxonomy: Microtrichomanes nitidulum is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This family is commonly known as the filmy ferns. The Hymenophyllaceae family belongs to the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. Within the division, Microtrichomanes nitidulum is classified as a member of the class Polypodiopsida, which is a group of ferns that have a distinctive leaf morphology. The class Polypodiopsida is further divided into several orders, with the family Hymenophyllaceae placed within the order Hymenophyllales.

intro: Microtrichomanes nitidulum is a species of fern, specifically a type of epiphytic fern belonging to the family Hymenophyllaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Microtrichomanes nitidulum contains bioactive constituents like flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The plant is commonly prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats.
